{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260324121533DF8ABB5344AAE509A8BA\"}"},"total":288},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7494775937306215193","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"句句铿锵有力，“说的对，世界上不公平的事儿很多，但唯有时间最公平，你懒惰还是努力，时间都会给出结果。一切都让时间来见证。\n“走过的路长了，遇见的人多了，经历的事儿杂了。不经意间就会发现，人生最曼妙的风景是内心的淡定与从容，头脑的睿智与清醒。”写到心坎里去了。\n有时候跟孩子也是这样讲，“不要在该奋斗的年纪偷懒，只有度过了一段连自己都被感动的日子，才会变成那个最好的自己。”可是孩子们总是不碰壁不回头。感谢作者写出这样令人励志的佳作，这样有浓厚时代感的作品不拍电视剧太可惜，希望能早日进入大众的视觉，让更多人品味其中的做人做事法则。","text_exts":[{"e":199,"s":196,"text":"不回头","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44\u0026hyperlink_type=quote_book\u0026directQueryWord=%E4%B8%8D%E5%9B%9E%E5%A4%B4\u0026directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774325734E509A8BA%230%23%23\u0026directTabType=0\u0026reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227494775937306215193%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227477465634566065176%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E4%B8%8D%E5%9B%9E%E5%A4%B4%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D\u0026halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1745019746,"group_id":"7477465634566065176","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"九分好的男人，就剩一分差，九分傻的男人，还剩一分精。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5co8oa7t9CqHzgZ9OhT++U=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/2d0dc0450f5243cc9ca73d1d4e84a2bf~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776880619\u0026x-signature=1Jh8qt4LqA10MG42AVZFkCSX%2FJc%3D","user_id":"51570974729","user_name":"魏平硕"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"51570974729","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_1","intro":"{\"title_name\":\"作家Lv.1\",\"title_id\":\"author_level_1\"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{\"title_text\":\"作家Lv.1\",\"title_default_color\":\"#FFFFFF\",\"title_dark_color\":\"#FFFFFF\",\"bg_default_color\":\"{\\\"start\\\":\\\"#FF9F31\\\",\\\"end\\\":\\\"#FFB95C\\\"}\",\"bg_dark_color\":\"{\\\"start\\\":\\\"#CC8029\\\",\\\"end\\\":\\\"#CC9349\\\"}\",\"title_dark_diaphaneity\":\"CC\"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.1"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7477465634566065176","book_info":{"abstract":"职场的正义与腐败的较量，作品通过落马官员的轨迹，描述他们破纪到破法的过程，深刻揭示腐败分子不得人心的现实，刻画出他们灵魂衰落的轨迹。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2oc1d49570f2b7a2a69e328583bcb78e20~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"金施","author_id":"","book_id":"7477465634566065176","book_name":"职场舸潮","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282818","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":261,\"name\":\"都市日常\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=261\u0026name=都市日常\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":1,\"name\":\"都市\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1\u0026name=都市\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":558,\"name\":\"仕途\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=558\u0026name=仕途\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7477526007289758232","read_count":"874","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"163599"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.4","serial_count":"60","tags":"都市日常,都市,仕途","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2oc1d49570f2b7a2a69e328583bcb78e20~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1779509734\u0026x-signature=YVhZdk4zFFyIKt3ytgnBTDzUpXs%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4152192320683342","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"165"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260324121533DF8ABB5344AAE509A8BA\"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读19小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":14,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":41426,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":69841,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":1263},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7496210736063808281","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"超级够写实风格，看后令人震惊！！你们认为我说的对不对，给我也点个赞呗！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1745358571,"group_id":"7477465634566065176","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2793231769929629"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7477465634566065176","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"260"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读8小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":17816,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":29327,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7494741413006164761","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"说实话很久没有看到这样接地气的好作品了，像鲁义这样的好领导也许少之又少，但是能让人看到希望。让人看的时而伤感时而压抑时而失落时而迷茫最后都是希望。这真是一本完美的教科书，邪不压正的道理剖析的淋漓尽致，如果能有更多多人看到，让那些真正做事的人做的更好，做的不好的何止羞愧难当，让他们知道做人做事的原则是什？底线是什么？不可以把利己主义放在心里，做让人民信赖的人才是本质。太多的感动，太多的刺眼词却不能说出来，太多的心里话不能说也只能化作一句感谢，感谢作者让普通人看到很多看不到的东西！","text_exts":[{"e":230,"s":227,"text":"普通人","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44\u0026hyperlink_type=quote_book\u0026directQueryWord=%E6%99%AE%E9%80%9A%E4%BA%BA\u0026directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774325734E509A8BA%230%23%23\u0026directTabType=0\u0026reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227494741413006164761%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227477465634566065176%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%99%AE%E9%80%9A%E4%BA%BA%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D\u0026halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1745020515,"group_id":"7477465634566065176","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nw8b4t+MiDKpvArFNlEjVy5q3SeBpwmimtCmRpq/ssxo","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/270d7b5d945b411d8ee9b8780153b49c~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776878835\u0026x-signature=rgoz9%2BHozzrZdCPuaXs7wMg39Ko%3D","user_id":"2793231769929629","user_name":"雪绒花yyy"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2793231769929629","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7477465634566065176","book_info":{"abstract":"职场的正义与腐败的较量，作品通过落马官员的轨迹，描述他们破纪到破法的过程，深刻揭示腐败分子不得人心的现实，刻画出他们灵魂衰落的轨迹。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2oc1d49570f2b7a2a69e328583bcb78e20~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"金施","author_id":"","book_id":"7477465634566065176","book_name":"职场舸潮","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282818","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":261,\"name\":\"都市日常\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=261\u0026name=都市日常\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1
